title: MineHanced 2
description: Modpack, under development since version 1.12.2, created for a comfortable game without adding changes to the generation of the world and without new items. Extremely pleasant optimization without frills.
body:
![Minehanced 2.0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/001130a17258690b3e8bc1eedac17221bd7f7481.png)


*Modpack, under development since version 1.12.2, created for a comfortable game without adding changes to the generation of the world and without new items. Extremely pleasant optimization without frills. There is no shader support. At the moment there is only a Fabric version.*


Q: Will the mod pack be updated to version 1.21?

A: Yes! The alpha version is already available for download.


Q: Will there be a Forge version?

A: No, there is no Sodium, and its fork is not a worthy replacement. There is also no decent alternative for other mods.


[Performance]

FPS before: ~110+

FPS with modpack: ~750+

[I7-10700kf|RTX 4080|4x16 RAM 3866]


FPS before: ~210+

FPS with modpack: ~1500+

[I7-12700kf|RTX 4080|2x32 RAM 6400]


(MineHanced + New Optimization) - *CurseForge* = **MineHanced 2.0** 

**WORKS ONLY ON NVIDIA GRAPHICS CARDS WITH TURING ARCHITECTURE (16xx/20xx) AND NEWER**

[Mods update status for 1.21](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1h1KIyZH89d2o0L-1Gu6POCLMrYf2axozZUfs8dAKkhQ/edit?usp=sharing)
